free_text: Mass  resolved  angular distribution in 10-B, 12-C, and
16-O induced fission of 232-Th
Bhabha Atomic Research Centre.
The self-supporting thorium metal target having
thickness of 1.3 mg/cm2 was used
80 cm3 HPGe detector coupled to a multichannel
analyzer.
Center of Mass Angular Distributions For Some
Projectiles
The Statistical Errors
Tbl.I from Phys.Rev.,C51(1995)165
Otto Schwerer's remark is included
Last checking has been done.
SD: Corrections in all Subents. BIB updated
The accuracy of data presentation revised. COMMENT,
PART-DET deleted.
